title: [AI5] Synthesize Cross-DM Conversation Context for Agent
summary: Implemented a Slack-like cross-DM context synthesizer for Victor-style agents. It identifies the incoming sender, filters recent history by user and agent participation, applies configurable look-back/max-message/exclusion rules, emits a coherent `context_string`, and records retrieval audit metadata.

checks.notes: Validated user filtering, agent participation filtering, growth-channel exclusion, context string generation, and audit range reporting.

usage.command: python3 scripts/autonomy/cross_dm_context_synthesizer.py --history slack-history.json --incoming incoming-dm.json --agent-id victor --lookback-hours 24 --max-messages 50 --exclude growth-channel --output context.json
